violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of shelving and the mixer stand in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Per the PIC, surfaces are to be sealed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking a proper air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities was observed in need of repair/adjustment... - The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen and prep areas were observed to be lacking coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. - The floor in the upstairs prep area and the downstairs ice machine area were observed to be in poor repair and in need of resealing/refinishing. The physical facilities are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
